improvements.proposal: Require enforcement checks in IaC module contracts (e.g., Linux Consumption Y1 + reserved=true) instead of trusting caller-provided IDs.
improvements.reason: Code review found criterion #2 could be bypassed when only accepting an arbitrary serverFarmId.

improvements.proposal: Explicitly instruct the implementor to mark sensitive parameters with `@secure()` and avoid exposing them via outputs.
improvements.reason: Code review highlighted app insights connection string should be treated as sensitive input.

improvements.proposal: Add a prompt requirement to run `az bicep build` for changed Bicep modules and map each acceptance criterion to concrete validation evidence.
improvements.reason: Review suggested stronger automated validation coverage for infra acceptance criteria.
